title: VR Hand Fixes
description: This Resource Pack help with fixing issues with some items being displaced in VR, this can fix it for it can be on your hand instead of in the air!
body:
Vivecraft does not support custom 3D Models and to fix that, I've made this VR Hand Fixes Resource Pack for 1.20.1 I do know that Vivecraft has an option for the items to be place in the hand properly like the Thirdperson Camera, but it does looks we rid to me, so that lead to this Resource Pack.

After a few weeks on thinking how it works, I finally gotten a prototye of it working with one mod, but now it is working with multiple mods. And you don't need ETF/EMF for this to work, just Minecraft, Vivecraft and a supported mod in this Resource Pack.

If anyone finds any issues, please let me know on the Offical Modrinth Discord Server!
